title: Compressed Leaves
description: This mod add many things made of leaves and other plants.
body:
[![Sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b49b68aa931736bddd458f22eed5fee5f8cac065_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=624) **Need a server? Kinetic Hosting comes to help! Use code: [DIMAS](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=624)** Current features are Compressed leaves, Balls of seeds and Heart of Grown Now supports fabric!  Balls of seeds: can smelt 2 items. Currently only 2 types - wheet and beetroot can be uncrafted back to seeds  Heart of Grown: randomly applies bonemeal effect to plants in 5x5 radius  Compressed leaves: can smelt 4 items can be uncrafted back to leaves
Currently there are 16 types of Compressed leaves: Vanilla: - ~~Compressed leaves (crafts from any other type)~~ (removed in 0.4) - Compressed oak leaves - Compressed birch leaves - Compressed spruce leaves - Compressed jungle leaves - Compressed acacia leaves - Compressed dark oak leaves - Compressed azalea leaves  - Compressed mangrove leaves (only 1.19 and up) - Compressed cherry leaves (only 1.20 and up) Quark (Forge only): - Compressed frosty blossom leaves - Compressed serene blossom leaves - Compressed warm blossom leaves - Compressed sweet blossom leaves - Compressed sunny blossom leaves - Compressed fiery blossom leaves Myrtrees (Forge only): - Compressed rubberwood leaves Other leaves from mods in future!
Mods compatibilities:  (Forge only) Added in 0.3: Compressed leaves and Balls of seeds can be used in Basic genertor from FTB Industrial Contraptions Farmers from MineColonies can craft Balls of seeds Lumberjacks from MineColonies can craft vanilla Compressed leaves
Need a server? Kinetic Hosting comes to help! 1.20+ is now the only supported version! Thats mean future updates will not be backported ![Craft](https://i.imgur.com/iIygz6T.png) ![Smelting](https://i.imgur.com/as0YAP8.png)
